overview.short: Dategad Fort is a small fort located 75 kilometres (47 mi) South of Satara, in the Maharashtra state of India.
overview.description: Dategad Fort is a small fort located 75 kilometres (47 mi) South of Satara, in the Maharashtra state of India. This fort can be visited in a day from Satara. The nearest town is Patan. The base village is Tolewadi from where an easy trek of 45 minutes leads to the entrance of the fort.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Yerad
topPlaces.description: Yerad is a village in the Patan Taluka, Satara District in the Maharashtra state of India. Yerad is located 6.2 km distance from its Taluka main town, Patan.

topPlaces.name: 1967 Koynanagar earthquake
topPlaces.description: The 1967 Koynanagar earthquake occurred near Koynanagar town in Maharashtra, India on 11 December local time. The magnitude 6.6 shock hit with a maximum Mercalli intensity of VIII (Severe).

topPlaces.name: Patan, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Patan is a census town in Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Patan Caves
topPlaces.description: The Patan Buddhist caves are recently discovered rock-cut caves, near Patan, Maharashtra, in the district of Satara. Eleven caves were discovered all together, spread in four different areas of Patan, in Tamkane, Yerphal, Yeradvadi and Digevadi.

topPlaces.name: Yerphal Caves
topPlaces.description: Yerphal Caves, also Yerphale Caves, are a small group of Buddhist caves located near Umbraj, Maharashtra, India. The caves were only discovered recently, in 1979.

topPlaces.name: Vankusawade Wind Park
topPlaces.description: Vankusawade Wind Park is a wind farm located on a high mountain plateau at 1,150 m above the Koyana Reservoir, around 40 km from the town of Satara, Satara District in Maharashtra. Wind power is generated from Suzlon S33/350 turbines of 350 kW each.

topPlaces.name: Sulewadi
topPlaces.description: Sulewadi is a village situated in Malshiras tehsil and located in the Solapur district of Maharashtra, India. It is on the road to Pandharpur.

items.note: Yerad is a village in the Patan Taluka, Satara District in the Maharashtra state of India. Yerad is located 6.2 km distance from its Taluka main town, Patan.
The 1967 Koynanagar earthquake occurred near Koynanagar town in Maharashtra, India on 11 December local time. The magnitude 6.6 shock hit with a maximum Mercalli intensity of VIII (Severe).
Patan is a census town in Satara district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

The Patan Buddhist caves are recently discovered rock-cut caves, near Patan, Maharashtra, in the district of Satara. Eleven caves were discovered all together, spread in four different areas of Patan, in Tamkane, Yerphal, Yeradvadi and Digevadi.
Yerphal Caves, also Yerphale Caves, are a small group of Buddhist caves located near Umbraj, Maharashtra, India. The caves were only discovered recently, in 1979.

Vankusawade Wind Park is a wind farm located on a high mountain plateau at 1,150 m above the Koyana Reservoir, around 40 km from the town of Satara, Satara District in Maharashtra. Wind power is generated from Suzlon S33/350 turbines of 350 kW each.
Sulewadi is a village situated in Malshiras tehsil and located in the Solapur district of Maharashtra, India. It is on the road to Pandharpur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dategad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dategad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (128 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dategad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dategad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dategad?
faq.a: Stays in Dategad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dategad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yerad, 1967 Koynanagar earthquake, Patan, Maharashtra, Patan Caves, Yerphal Caves.
